emails.subject: TR Bond Swap Confirmation
emails.body: Sara, Paul wants to know if we have any objections to the attached form of confirmation. Please let me know if you have any concerns. Thank you! Forwarded by Laurel Adams/HOU/ECT on 07/31/2000 05:00 PM From: Paul Pizzolato 07/31/2000 09:32 AM

emails.subject: Re: TR Bond Swap Confirmation
emails.body: Re: TR Bond Swap Confirmation Laurel: I need to verify the Enron party (specifically). I am reviewing the format. Thanks. Sara Laurel Adams 07/31/2000 05:03 PM

emails.subject: Re: TR Bond Swap Confirmation
emails.body: Re: TR Bond Swap Confirmation We should be ECT Investments Inc.
